name: forge
description: Agent workflows for using the Forge CLI safely.

interface.shortDescription: Use Forge's agent-native source-control CLI safely.
interface.longDescription: Forge teaches agents how to drive the Forge CLI for checked change attempts: initialize repositories, checkpoint work, capture evidence, propose and verify changes, accept reviewed proposals, sync native history, and export provenance to Git without editing Forge internals.
defaultPrompt: Use Forge to checkpoint this change.
Review the current Forge proposal evidence.
Export an accepted Forge proposal to Git.
